name: Global Power Synergy Public Company Limited
summary: Global Power Synergy Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production and distribution of electricity, steam, and water for industrial purpose in Thailand. The company operates through three segments: Independent Power Producer, Small Power Producer, and Others. It generates electricity through solar, hydropower, and cogeneration power plants. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
